title: cereus moniliformis
intro: Cereus moniliformis, also known as the dragon fruit pitaya cactus, is a species of cactus native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Cereus moniliformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in some food products, including juices and supplements.
